title: Are two players looking at each other
prompt:
In Garry's Mod Lua, you need a cheap check for whether two players are roughly looking at each other (aim directions face each other). A naive check computes the angle between them with math.acos. Show a fast approach for this.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: GetAimVector dot product or distance comparison without math.acos
